idea: MixRight — tropical SEA concrete mix assistant with humidity/temperature-adjusted water-cement ratios
niche: small-scale contractors and OFW self-builders in Thailand, Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia who hand-mix with no testing equipment
api: Open-Meteo (free, no key, temp+humidity by GPS)

idea: GreenDeck — location-aware plant care OS for serious Thai gardeners and aroid collectors
niche: urban Bangkok/Chiang Mai balcony and rooftop plant enthusiasts with 50–1000+ plant collections, especially aroid collectors and DIY hydroponics growers
apis: Open-Meteo (solar/UV/wind, no key), Perenual (plant DB, free tier), Pl@ntNet (plant ID, free tier), SunCalc (JS lib, sun path), OpenAQ (air quality, free), Supabase Storage (photos)
